risk_title: ARTF Cancellation Due to Extraordinary Political Situation
risk_summary: The Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) portion of the project grant was canceled, and IDA grant disbursements remain suspended due to the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan, directly impacting project implementation capacity.
evidence_quote: The Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) portion of the grant for the project was canceled based on the consideration that the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan. Undisbursed IDA grant under this project will remain suspended until a decision is made by the World Bank.
